positive: A hyper-detailed watercolor painting of a bioluminescent forest scene at twilight. Giant glowing mushrooms, intricate roots, and fireflies casting an ethereal blue and emerald light. Studio Ghibli inspired, highly saturated, magical realism, concept art.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, grayscale, harsh lines
